svg.title: Job data pipeline architecture
svg.desc: A flowchart showing job data flowing from multiple sources through ingestion, normalization, deduplication, storage, and out to the app layer.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about using SerpApi for Google Jobs data')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about TheirStack as a job data source')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Adzuna API')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about RemoteOK as a job data source')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about The Muse API')
sendPrompt('How should I build the ingestion worker for job data?')
sendPrompt('What fields should the normalized job schema include?')
g.text: title · company · location · salary · type · source_url

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should I deduplicate job listings across sources?')
sendPrompt('How should salary normalization work in the enrichment layer?')
sendPrompt('How do I tag jobs for visa sponsorship?')
sendPrompt('How should I generate job embeddings for semantic search?')
sendPrompt('Should I use Postgres or another database for job listings?')
sendPrompt('How should I set up vector search for job listings?')
sendPrompt('What endpoints should the job data API expose?')
sendPrompt('How should the job board UI consume the job data API?')
sendPrompt('How can I build a job match engine on top of this pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What alerts and notifications should the pipeline trigger?')
